merged_events.event_description: U.S. Liaison Office opened in Luanda with Jeffrey Millington as Director.

evidence.quote: The U.S. Liaison Office in Luanda was opened January 10, 1992, with Jeffrey Millington as Director.

merged_events.event_description: Diplomatic relations established and American Embassy opened when Ambassador Edmund T. De Jarnette presented credentials to Angolan authorities.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on July 14, 1994, when American Ambassador Edmund T. De Jarnette presented his credentials to Angolan authorities.

merged_events.event_description: A U.S. liaison office was established in Angola, with Jeffrey Millington serving as Director.

evidence.quote: Jeffrey Millington, Director. Credentials presented: 1992-01. Left post on 1992-10.

matched.notes: RDCR (Event 0) gives exact date 1992-01-10; POCOM (Event 2) gives month-level 1992-01. Both confirm the opening of the U.S. Liaison Office in Luanda. Exact date match with CSV.
RDCR (Event 1) gives exact date 1994-07-14 for establishment of diplomatic relations and opening of the American Embassy. Exact date match with CSV.
